subject: A white and purple bio-armored alien emperor figure in first form, depicted with a distinctive horned helmet, slim elongated build, and visible tail, standing in a commanding pose
description: A slim, imposing alien figure stands in a composed commanding pose wearing distinctive white and purple bio-armor. The head bears a smooth domed helmet with visible horns or protrusions. The figure has an elongated, almost delicate build despite its threatening presence. A tail is visible curving behind the figure. The background shows bright radiating energy lines in a dark field, creating a dramatic spotlight effect. The overall palette is white, purple, and dark with streaks of yellow energy. Image quality is low resolution, limiting fine detail confirmation.
foreground: White and purple armored alien emperor with horned helmet and tail
background: Dark field with radiating yellow-white energy lines
